title: Grammar Structures from the Text
instructions: Complete each sentence with 2–5 words exactly as they appear in the article.

questions.sentence: The Trump administration ordered Anthropic ______ from its latest AI models.
questions.explanation: Infinitive construction: order somebody to do something.

questions.sentence: The government can decide who ______ the world's most important technology.
The administration was responding to a prompt that ______ against hacking or making bioweapons.
questions.explanation: Present Simple used in a defining relative clause.

questions.sentence: The legal basis of the order ______, according to the article.
Global access to the best AI may ______ a decision in the Oval Office.
Modern cryptography led America to accept ______ secure allies and boosting offensive capabilities.
questions.explanation: Fixed expression followed by parallel noun phrases.

questions.sentence: Open-weight models could ______ if they become widely available.
A stronger AI model may uncover one more vulnerability, and the weaker party ______.
To freeze AI research at America's best lab ______.
The best capabilities will ______ by America.
